# Standx-cli codebase architecture overview (2026-03-04 15:15Z)

_**User**_

Explore the standx-cli codebase thoroughly. I need to understand:

1. The overall project structure (all directories and key files)
2. The CLI argument parsing / command definitions (likely in main.rs or cli.rs)
3. How commands are dispatched and executed
4. The API client layer (how it communicates with the exchange)
5. Any existing dashboard-related code
6. The Cargo.toml dependencies
7. Key data types/models used

Please provide a comprehensive summary of the codebase architecture, listing all important files and their purposes. Be very thorough.
